_comment: Extraction schema for the morning call (Vapi analysis.structuredDataPlan). The extraction LLM reads the transcript after the call and emits this object; it maps 1:1 to daily_entries morning fields via save-entry (FR-015). Each beat of vapi/morning.md feeds a field. Inferred fields (valence/arousal/affect_label) are read from tone + content — never asked aloud.

gratitude.description: The one thing the person said they appreciated or were grateful for (the Appreciate beat). Their own words, condensed. Empty string if none surfaced.

desired_feeling.description: How the person said they want to FEEL today (the Tune beat), e.g. 'calm', 'focused', 'open'. One or two words. Empty string if not given.

intention.description: The single concrete thing they committed to that would make today feel aligned (the Aim beat). One anchor, not a list. Empty string if none.

action_steps.description: The 1-3 concrete, finishable steps they named to accomplish the intention today (the Aim breakdown), each ideally with a when, e.g. 'email Sam before lunch'. Empty array if none.

clearing.description: Anything heavy they named that they wanted to set down (the Clear beat). Their own words, condensed. Empty string if nothing was raised.

valence_morning.description: Inferred overall emotional valence of how they ARRIVED this morning, from -1 (very unpleasant) to 1 (very pleasant). Infer from tone and content; never ask. Use 0 if genuinely neutral/unclear.

arousal_morning.description: Inferred activation/energy of how they arrived, from -1 (calm, flat, deactivated) to 1 (activated, energized, or agitated). Infer from tone and content; never ask.

affect_label_morning.description: A single human-readable word for their dominant arriving state, e.g. 'anxious', 'flat', 'calm', 'tired', 'energized', 'scattered'.

themes.description: 1-4 short topic tags surfaced in the call, e.g. 'work', 'family', 'health', 'rest', 'money'. Lowercase, single words where possible.
